attacking_style: Long-range solo efforts initiated after extended periods of attacking, capable of sustaining breakaways for 30+ kilometers. Prefers extended attrition over explosive accelerations.
team_tactics: Deployed in aggressive domestique role for leadouts on challenging terrain. Willing to sacrifice own chances through repeated attacks to soften competition before protected riders move.
terrain_preference: Hot conditions and endurance-testing stages where sustained power over 1.5+ hours of racing advantages him. Long-distance breakaways where tactical confusion among GC teams can be exploited.
vulnerability: Lacks finishing punch to convert solo efforts or deliver successful leadouts. Depends on disorganized chase dynamics; vulnerable when strong teams commit to organized pursuit.
key_patterns: Engages in prolonged attacking sequences lasting over an hour before committing to solo moves.
Nearly successful breakaways rely on GC team hesitation rather than outright strength dominance.
Functions as aggressive domestique attempting aggressive leadouts to drop sprinters on challenging finales.
form_trajectory: neutral: showed exceptional endurance reserves in Tirreno but failed to deliver tactical objectives at Giro, suggesting strong engine without conversion ability
